text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Admire Vega has starting training nonstop once
again, despite my warnings. During one such
session, she feels a sharp pain in her left leg.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
It seems she's been expecting this to happen,
based on a reoccurring nightmare she's been
suffering in the lead up to the Kikuka Sho. But
she doesn't care what happens to her, so long as
she can complete her atonement.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
However, when Admire Vega loses consciousness,
she comes face-to-face with her sister, who tells
her that she never did anything wrong.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Her sister says with a smile, "I was happy to be
able to race together," before embracing the
tragic fate meant for Admire Vega and
disappearing.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Admire Vega finally hears my frantic calling and
wakes up.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
She clings onto me and begins crying—with half
of herself now gone, she feels lonely and empty.
